title: Ulter's Extra Food
description: Mod that adds some golden, baked and others variants of food
body:
## What mod adds?
Ulter's Extra Food is small simple mod that adds new types of food that were missing in the game. For example more golden food: Golden Potato, Golden Beetroot, Golden Loaf(Bread) and others. Also adds new baked/craftable food: Baked Carrot, Bowl Of Sweet/Glow-berry Jam.
**Golden food applies effect to a player when eated like Golden Apple**


### Download and use this mod in your modpacks if you want to make the game full with content

## Developing
Mod is still under developing, I will add more food in it
